subcodes.first_line: The very atoms have borne witness unto Him Who hath come with the signs of signs, while mankind remaineth heedless and in hypocrisy, save those whom God hath preserved [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد شهد الذرات لمن اتی برآیات الایات و الناس فی غفله و نفاق الا من عصمه الله
subcodes.subjects: @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @power of prayer, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @prayer for praise and gratitude
